overview: HalalVet is an AI-powered halal finance vetting platform that assesses and profiles individuals and businesses seeking ethical Islamic financing, connecting them with verified financiers.
features: Three-role platform: admin/super-admin, business applicants, individual applicants, and financiers
AI agents: Tawthiq (onboarding/KYC), Mizan (risk scoring), Kashif (investment discovery)
Multi-step registration for LLC, Business Name, and Individual applicants
Automated Shariah compliance screening and inconsistency detection
Mono bank integration for live financial data
Admin analytics dashboard with KPI widgets
Financier shortlist and deal report export
Session timeout protection and NDPR compliance features
